message:
fix: consolidate duplicate card add buttons into single top-right bubble (#3763) (#3768)

Remove the two separate insert-before/insert-after "+" buttons that appeared
on the left and right sides of cards on hover. Replace them with a single
add-card button positioned at the top-right corner, styled as a notification
bubble with a ring border for contrast against the card background.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
